title: cyperus oblongus var. ruwenzoriensis
intro: Cyperus oblongus var. ruwenzoriensis, also known as Ruwenzori Cyperus or Cyperus of the Ruwenzori Mountains, is a variety of the Cyperus oblongus species, a type of sedge found in tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyperus oblongus var. ruwenzoriensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
